title: hibbertia millarii
intro: Hibbertia millarii, also known as Yellow Daisy Bush, is a small, shrub-like plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Dilleniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it beneficial for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Hibbertia millarii has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off free radicals, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote overall skin health.
